titleStmt.title: SII 19.55: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 55. (A.R. No. 19 of 1929.) TIRUMAḺAVĀḌI, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VAIDYANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers a gift of 4 mā of land at Tennūr in Kalaiyamaṅgalam a brahma dāya and dēvadāna of Kīḻpilāṟu, a sub-division of Poygai-nāḍu, for maintaining a petual lamp in the temple of Tirumaḻuvādi-Mahādēva, by Ariñjigai Kēṇi the daughter of Mūtta-Uḍaiyār [the elder lord ?]. She is stated to have purchased it for 20 kaḻañju of gold including the cost of tax-exemption, while the kīḻ-mudal right over the land had been already gifted away to the temple by one Guṇāṟṟiyaṉ (Guṇāḍhya) T[r*]iyambakaṉ of Kalaiyamaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 3āvatu tirumaḻuvāṭi mahādevarkku nicatam Uḻakku neyyāl Oru non=tāviḷa
kku Erippataṟku mutta Uṭaiyār makaḷār Aṟiñcikai keṇiyen poykaināṭṭu kiḻpilāṟṟu tevatāna brahmadeya
m kalaiyamaṅkalattu kuṇāṟṟiyan tiyampakan tevan tirumaḻapāṭi mahādevarkku kiḻmutal tānam Aṭṭina nilam
kalaiyamaṅkalattu tennūr nālmāceykku Ellai kiḻpāṟkkellai ciṟuvaṇṭur nattattukku meṟkum tenpāṟ
kellai Uḷciṟuvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpālkellai Oḻukkaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tevarorumāvukku teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunānkellaiyilu
m Akappaṭṭa nilam Ūril vāypaṭai nānkumāccey Uḷḷa kalam Uṭaiya veḷḷāḷan Aruḷan pakaiyaṉai conṟa pon patinaiṅkaḻañcu patinaiṅkaḻañcum Ūriṭu varippā
ṭṭāl vanta Iṟai Eppeṟpaṭṭutukkum paliceyālk kuṭutta pon Aiṅkaḻañcu Aiṅkaḻañcum Āka pon Irupatiṉkaḻañcum kuṭuttu cey koṇṭu kuṭutten Aṟiñcikai keṇiyen Itu cantrā- ticca
val Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 19.55 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
